trackedDelta: Reconciled against interests.json. OBOS/Lyn entry now lists both the 25 July (Strømsgodset, away) and new 2 August (Sogndal, home) fixtures. failures: Minor: 'London Athletics Meet – Karsten Warholm' is confidence:high while its exact race time is self-described as estimated/not-yet-published — acceptable (event/date/broadcaster solid, 3 evidence URLs, >7 days out) but medium would be more honest until the detailed schedule drops.

notes: Biggest fix: streaming corrections that the last TWO runs claimed but never actually landed on main are now written AND validated (validate-events.js: 45 events, 0 errors). Root cause of the recurring loss is almost certainly the research commit being dropped/overwritten during rebase against the concurrent static pipeline; this run follows the exact commit+rebase sequence and re-verifies events.json on origin after push.

Corrections verified live this run: Sjakk-NM NRK→Direktesport (Amedia broadcasts all games live, Rookieredhead commentates); Wimbledon damefinale+herrefinale TV 2 Play→HBO Max+Eurosport (WBD holds Grand Slam rights in Norway — tennis is NOT on TV 2; finals also free on WBD free channel REX); EWC chess NRK→Chess.com/Twitch/YouTube; all 21 Tour de France stages gained Max (Eurosport) alongside TV 2 Play (shared 2026–2030 rights, tvkampen.com + hjelp.tv2.no).

New event: Lyn – Sogndal home at Bislett Sunday 2 August 17:00 Oslo (OBOS-ligaen round 16) — resolves the single high-severity coverage-audit recall gap. Fact-checked by a fresh-context subagent against fotball.no (fiksId 8986733): date/time/venue confirmed, TV 2 Play. Confidence high.

Ruud National Bank Open Montreal (Masters 1000, main draw 3–13 Aug, TV 2 Play): tournament confirmed but Ruud's entry UNVERIFIABLE now (roster/draw published ~31 July). Per the write-time fact-check, unverifiable→dropped rather than guessed. Documented as a tracked follow-up; re-verify late July. Washington DC Open (25 Jul–2 Aug) entry also unconfirmed.
Ventura: still no confirmed start after John Deere Classic (finished 5 July, ~124th); Barracuda (16–19 Jul) / 3M Open (23–26 Jul) unconfirmed. No event added.
coverage-gaps.json (Premier League feud, Lyn weather warning) were RSS noise / not concrete events — dismissed. Scout logged 12x 'quiet' over the last day.
